title: Vietnamese Beef Curry
description: A rich and flavorful Vietnamese-inspired beef curry made with tender beef, fresh tomatoes, and aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: beef
ingredients.amount: 1 pound (450g) beef brisket or chuck, cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large pan over medium-high heat. Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the pan and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil to the pan and reduce heat to medium.
Add the curry paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
Add the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Return the beef to the pan and add the diced tomatoes, fish sauce, and sugar (if using).
Stir to combine and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the beef is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Season with black pepper and rice vinegar (if using).
Serve hot over steamed rice or noodles.
Garnish with fresh cilantro or scallions, if desired.
